query:
UPDATE games SET
  awayBookSpread = CASE WHEN awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL AND awayBookSpread NOT LIKE '-%' AND awayBookSpread NOT LIKE '+%' THEN CONCAT('+', awayBookSpread) ELSE awayBookSpread END,
  homeBookSpread = CASE WHEN homeBookSpread IS NOT NULL AND homeBookSpread NOT LIKE '-%' AND homeBookSpread NOT LIKE '+%' THEN CONCAT('+', homeBookSpread) ELSE homeBookSpread END,
  openAwaySpread = CASE WHEN openAwaySpread IS NOT NULL AND openAwaySpread NOT LIKE '-%' AND openAwaySpread NOT LIKE '+%' THEN CONCAT('+', openAwaySpread) ELSE openAwaySpread END,
  openHomeSpread = CASE WHEN openHomeSpread IS NOT NULL AND openHomeSpread NOT LIKE '-%' AND openHomeSpread NOT LIKE '+%' THEN CONCAT('+', openHomeSpread) ELSE openHomeSpread END
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate IN ('2026-03-25', '2026-03-26');

  awayBookSpread = CASE WHEN awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL AND awayBookSpread NOT LIKE '-%' AND awayBookSpread NOT LIKE '+%' THEN CONCAT('+', awayBookSpread) ELSE awayBookSpread END,
  homeBookSpread = CASE WHEN homeBookSpread IS NOT NULL AND homeBookSpread NOT LIKE '-%' AND homeBookSpread NOT LIKE '+%' THEN CONCAT('+', homeBookSpread) ELSE homeBookSpread END,
  openAwaySpread = CASE WHEN openAwaySpread IS NOT NULL AND openAwaySpread NOT LIKE '-%' AND openAwaySpread NOT LIKE '+%' THEN CONCAT('+', openAwaySpread) ELSE openAwaySpread END,
  openHomeSpread = CASE WHEN openHomeSpread IS NOT NULL AND openHomeSpread NOT LIKE '-%' AND openHomeSpread NOT LIKE '+%' THEN CONCAT('+', openHomeSpread) ELSE openHomeSpread END
WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate IN ('2026-03-25', '2026-03-26');
